title: Can Rei not have Liliths soul
display_title: Can Rei not have Liliths soul
wikitext:
[]: Can Rei "not" have Lilith's soul?             Quote Post by The Goose » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:07 am Is it possible for Rei not to have Lilith's soul? I think that its open-ended or not if she does, but I lack enough evidence for my claim. My two main reason for asking this reason is because why Shinji would show Rei that she isn't worthless and then in the episode 25, her mind says that she is fake? Also another reason why I ask this question is because Rei could surivive 3I without Lilith's soul. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:45 am I don't see how she couldn't have Lilith's soul. Rei's soul projects and ATF at least as powerful as Adam's. Her introspection in ep #25 + the I'm home, Welcome home (which shows where someone truely belongs in Japanese culture) bit in EoE makes it clear who's soul she has. ep #25 wrote: Rei 1: But the real you is somewhere else. You just don't know it. Because you don't want to see it. You're just avoiding it without realizing it. TEXT: "Because you're afraid" Rei 1 (OFF): Because it may not be human in form. Because the person that I have been so far may cease to exist.

[]: Re: Can Rei "not" have Lilith's soul?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 30, 2007 9:06 am The Goose wrote: Is it possible for Rei not to have Lilith's soul? I think that its open-ended or not if she does, but I lack enough evidence for my claim.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Tue Jan 30, 2007 10:07 am Rei saying shes home could mean another thing. All human souls came from Lilith so she could be just returning to the source. To clear up that Kaworu has Adam's soul. When Kaworu says that he has Adam's soul and Rei has Lilith's soul, the info he got from Seele could be a lie. Kaworu's mission was to join with Lilith to speed up 3I. What Seele told him was that since he has Adam's soul, he must return to Adam. While Kaworu did come from Adam, his mission wasn't like the agels. All the other angels were to go to Lilith so that humans would die. Somehow, Seele got Kaworu and ordered him to do what Seele wanted. Since Seele lied to Kaworu, how do we know if Kaworu has Adam's soul? Rei's introspections are a different story. Rei, throughout the show, has a hard time wondering who she is. Rei never knew that she was created and that she was angel. The "someone beyond her," could mean that she is thinking about her angelic origins. During episode 25, she comes to gripes with that fact that she was created. When the voices in her head say that Rei is afraid, this could mean that does have Lilith's soul considering that she is afraid of being fake. Thats one outcome. However, if Rei does say she is afraid she stops "not caring" and starts caring about herself. She shows that she has a soul by being afraid and being the opposite of what she was. Open-ended right there.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jan 30, 2007 1:37 pm The Goose wrote: To clear up that Kaworu has Adam's soul. When Kaworu says that he has Adam's soul and Rei has Lilith's soul, the info he got from Seele could be a lie. Kaworu's mission was to join with Lilith to speed up 3I. What Seele told him was that since he has Adam's soul, he must return to Adam. While Kaworu did come from Adam, his mission wasn't like the agels. All the other angels were to go to Lilith so that humans would die. Somehow, Seele got Kaworu and ordered him to do what Seele wanted. Since Seele lied to Kaworu, how do we know if Kaworu has Adam's soul?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Tue Jan 30, 2007 2:06 pm Whats the CI?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Jan 30, 2007 2:16 pm The Goose wrote: Whats the CI?

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Tue Jan 30, 2007 5:01 pm The CI lives here: http://www.evacommentary.org/misc-files/nge2ci_temp.txt I believe the general consensus is that it is valid unless it is directly contradicted by something stated in the show. To clear up that Kaworu has Adam's soul. When Kaworu says that he has Adam's soul and Rei has Lilith's soul, the info he got from Seele could be a lie.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:06 pm Anno already said that the "tell-all Eva" books or any "tell-all Eva" else will never get anime right. Plus, everyone knows how Lilith's body, at first, looks like a blob of white. Later, when Rei pulls the Lance of Longinus out of her body, her legs stick out. How could Lilith react to this if her soul is in Rei's body. Also, in EOE, Llilth's body has chaged from the normal blob of white into a more femine shape. How could Lilith's body change if Rei carry's her soul.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:11 pm The Rei clones do their happy-giggles routine despite not having souls; Adam was able to regrow post-2I despite lacking a soul and being sealed in plastic. Why, may I ask, is it so urgent that you prove something contrary to what has been accepted as a basic fact of the Eva canon for a decade?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:13 pm If Lilith still had a soul how could Rei control her? How could they possibly keep Lilith nailed to a cross? Rei belongs in Lilith, she said so herself. Ignoring the cultural context is doing a great dis-service to the shows creators. Rei even said she thought she was like Kaworu. ep #24 wrote: Rei: Why am I here? Why am I alive again? For what? And for whom? The Fifth Child... That boy... I feel as if he's the same as me. Why?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:36 pm BobBQ: Thanks for clearing that up, but saying Rei has Lilith's soul is cannon is wrong. Kaworu might have said that Rei was Lilith, but we don't know if his info is right! Seele lied to him saying that Central Dogma had Adam. Seele aren't dummys, they knew where Lilith was. They lied to Kaworu for a reason, they were trying to start there own 3I early. In the anime, Kaworu's origins were never given full deatil. He was born on Second Impact. But it was never said that he was created using the Lance of Longinus or anything else in the context of the series. Anonymous_Evafan: Gee, what would have happened if an angel fused with Lilith? Would it have been able to control Lilith. Yeah. Its the same thing with Rei. Your second point does raise an interesting question. But the answer lies in the minds of fans. I don't think Rei ever said that she and him we're alike.

[]:             Quote Post by Lujerker » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:40 pm Soul clonation ?????? Eva00 has the soul of Rei 1.... but Rei 2 has the lilith's soul..... and Lilith ????

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:41 pm The Goose wrote: Seele lied to him saying that Central Dogma had Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jan 30, 2007 7:52 pm Is this going to be another locked theard?? :? *sigh* Kaworu=Soul of Adam Rei=Soul of Lilith It doesn't get any easier to understand than that; if Rei DIDN'T have Lilith's soul, then why return to Lilith in 26'? Why the scene at the end of 26' of Adam and Lilith saying they are hope and the word "love"?

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Tue Jan 30, 2007 8:11 pm And furthermore, HOW DO WE KNOW THAT ANNO WASN'T LYING WHEN HE DICTATED THE CI?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jan 30, 2007 8:17 pm flatulant wrote: And furthermore, HOW DO WE KNOW THAT ANNO WASN'T LYING WHEN HE DICTATED THE CI?

[]:             Quote Post by flatulant » Tue Jan 30, 2007 8:18 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: And Eva Monkey, stop locking topics for no reason. It's getting annoying.

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Tue Jan 30, 2007 8:25 pm The Goose wrote: Anno already said that the "tell-all Eva" books or any "tell-all Eva" else will never get anime right.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Wed Jan 31, 2007 6:42 am The Red Cross book, Confidential Information, and any other info books by Gainax will never get it right. I'll admit that the books do give some backup to things in the show. However, if Anno says that they won't ever get it right, then he can't be wrong, he did create the show. Also, in EOE, I didn't mean the scene where Rei joins with Lilith and Lilith takes on Rei's shape. I meant before she joined with Lilith. Thats my fault, so sorry. Though considering that the Rei clones move without souls then Lilith could do this too. So theres no need to talk about this anymore. And the only reason I'm making so many threads is to find out from different sources. Anonymous_Evafan, I don't know if that scene could be considered cannon. If Seele did tell where Adam was, then it doesn't make sense for Kaworu to go to Central Dogma and for him to be surpised that Lilith there and not Adam.
